channel.title: friend club RSS Feed
channel.description: The official RSS Feed for https://friendclub.lol/

item.title: Identica
item.description:
Identica

2026-02-27 10PM ET

link

info

A softly lit dance experience where user’s shaders are replaced, conforming the group and drawing focus to body movement and flow of the room.

sets

dj: driima, ejay, okgold
vj: silent

item.title: Plato's Rave
item.description:
Plato’s Rave

2025-10-10

link

info

A one-time one-set experiment where individual user avatars were hidden and only observable through the shadows that they casted onto the wall.

sets

okgold

item.title: Ballworld
item.description:
Ballworld

2025-10-03 10:30PM ET

link

info

An event ran in a test world with real-time illumination diffusing over individual meshes.

sets

grost, ejay, tacical

item.title: Canada Day
item.description:
Canada Day

2025-07-01 9PM ET

link

info

A special one time mini-rave to celebrate national Canada Day.

sets

bunchasomething, lesse, ladybugvr, swiftp

link

info

item.title: +/- 130 Again
item.description:
+/- 130 Again

2025-05-30

link

info

a revamped version of our two room simultaneous dj venue from 2024. now featuring stereo audio.

sets

+130 (vj beesha): smited, y2fae, vbm., ollie, may

item.title: uplink
item.description:
uplink

2025-03-07

link

info

a kz inspired multi-level map with various different places to mingle. arealit fueled lighting with visual projections on the platforms. kinda my first map for an event yay (-ele) !

visuals by silent, jiqqler, and haxeria. map technology by okgold.

sets

jerk lamp condemn

item.title: residence: fifth floor

residence: fifth floor

2024-12-21

info

dark ambient & noise sets on the fifth floor of residence’s living quarters building.

sets

endless condemn slippymudman vbm.

full vod

item.title: evocation
item.description:
evocation

2024-12-07

info

BREAKING NEWS: Four living plushies have been spotted all over the freaking world! A cute but fierce one hanging outside of clubs at night, an energetic and quick moving borzoi running around fields of flowers, a rabbit-like one sleeping and rolling around forests, and lastly a neon green alien cat spotted at UFO hot spots. Rumor has it that four individuals are responsible for evoking spirits into these plushies through special frequencies.

sets

Depresso
Olivia Fallow
Suena
Yurinemu

item.title: gestalt
item.description:
gestalt

2024-10-26

link

info

a custom map by okgold designed to revitalize a deprecated lighting system. three performers, 1.5 hour sets. lights operated by okgold and moonbeam. performances by ghost_ryft, agateline, and condemn.

sets

ryft agateline condemn

item.title: mhouse 2
item.description:
mhouse 2

2024-10-04

link

info

our 2nd running of our vr recreation of the 2024 magfest airbnb. featuring a map by okgold, exclusively crafted fog from Raz, visuals by Silent, Gwiz, and iggi, and performances from JNZi, smited, Mona, Noxer, Tacical, moonbeam, and Lamp DX.

sets

smited b2b y2fae mona tacical moonbeam

item.title: mhouse
item.description:
mhouse

2024-05-11

link

info

Basement space with carefully baked volume of light, modified and colored at runtime for a dance party. Event was a collaboration with visual artist and programmer Raz who developed her own interface to maniplulate Frostbone’s volumetric fog in line with Pi’s LTCGI before anyone else

sets

it was open decks for those who attended the irl event!

item.title: golden sunset late-night
item.description:
golden sunset late-night

2024-05-04

link

info

A special late night Golden Sunset Pool Party to accommodate our international friends who can’t usually make it. Map using realtime directional light.

sets

syake daniel
luna moonlight
isle
velatix
rokumori

item.title: golden sunset (world revamp)
item.description:
golden sunset (world revamp)

2024-04-10

link

info

Friend Club’s own Golden Sunset Poolside Party returns this Wednesday with a brand new world 🌴 Sun and skin in the Mediterranean heat 🌺

sets

okgold, twenty, suena, xxhardbit3s

-/+ 130

2024-03-01

link

info

A two room-bpm tiered event where stereo->mono audio separation was used to project simultaneous audio streams into two separate zones of a map at once. This allowed for two simultanous rooms with a choice of below or above 130bpm music, and performers were organized so that the music would steadily rise or fall.

sets

-130: (vj silent) twenty, tacical, lamp dx, suena, los +130: (vj beesha) mona, jnzi, jexxe, olivia, pahdron, condemn

item.title: golden sunset breathwork
item.description:
golden sunset breathwork

2023-11-08

link

info

Wednesday night we return to #GoldenSunset’s poolside together 🌺 Let your worries drift away on the Mediterranean breeze 🌊. Exclusive to friend club discord, we’ll be holding a special group breathwork session at Golden Sunset 1hr prior to the event.

sets

xxhardbit3s condemn shashasha suena

item.title: depth
item.description:
depth

2023-06-22

link

info

A VJ focused event featuring stereoscopic screens, art, and purpose-built visuals to experiment with 3d technology within the bounds of VR. sets are unable to be uploaded due to their direct attachment to the space. please follow this link to watch a seminar by okgold describing the technology used to create this event.

sets

gpot ju.no seenic shaggi silent ten.exe

THIS IS NOT A POPUP BUT IT IS OPEN DECKS I GUESS HAPPY HALLOWEEN FROM FRIEND CLUB
